Rather than this, the government should be looking at what has been done in Germany and elsewhere and what the Labour Party has been saying to have a proper short hours scheme that supports people to stay in work and in their jobs part time.

Even Dame Lewis Casey has come out to say if you are going to say that you're going to pay two-thirds of someones salary you should also be saying they can only afford two-thirds of their rent or pay for two-thirds of the food for their family.
